info.title: Pin Payments API
info.description: Pin Payments REST API for processing payments, managing customers, refunds, transfers, and more. Base URL uses HTTP Basic Auth with your API key as the username.

basicAuth.description: Use your secret API key as the username and leave the password blank.

post.summary: Create a refund for a charge

amount.description: Amount to refund in base currency unit. Defaults to full charge amount.
